name: Woosmap Location Platform API
what_it_does: European location platform with REST API — enabling retail and enterprise companies to build store locators, geocode addresses, compute distances, and deliver location-aware experiences via GDPR-compliant maps and APIs, with first-party store data management, in-store search, and a privacy-focused alternative to Google Maps for European businesses.
use_cases: Building store locator widgets via Woosmap API for retail omnichannel customer experience
Geocoding and reverse geocoding European addresses via Woosmap for address validation
Computing distance matrices via Woosmap API for nearest store routing
Managing store/asset data via Woosmap Store Management API for location data sync
Implementing GDPR-compliant maps for EU businesses avoiding Google Analytics tracking
not_for: Global non-retail applications without store locator use case (Google Maps better for general mapping)
Real-time navigation and turn-by-turn routing (Woosmap is location context, not navigation)
Non-European companies without GDPR compliance requirements as primary driver
best_when: A European retail or enterprise company needs a GDPR-compliant store locator and maps solution — avoiding Google's data tracking while maintaining enterprise-grade location services with first-party store data management.
avoid_when: You need global consumer mapping, turn-by-turn navigation, or have no GDPR compliance requirements driving the vendor choice.

auth.notes: API key authentication. Private key for server-side API calls. Public key for client-side JavaScript SDK (exposed in browser — restricted by domain referer). Separate project keys per environment. No OAuth2. No fine-grained scopes. Key management via Woosmap Console. Private key must never be exposed in client-side code.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Free developer plan with limited API calls for testing
pricing.paid_tiers: Starter from ~€99/month; Pro and Enterprise custom pricing
pricing.notes: French company (Paris). Founded 2012 by Web Geo Services. GDPR-native by design (data hosted in EU). Positioned as Google Maps alternative for European enterprises. Store locator and asset tracking focus. Customers include BNP Paribas, Carrefour, Total Energies. Local SEO features (store pages). Multi-country address search. GDPR consent management built-in. JavaScript map library (no Google dependency). REST API for store data CRUD and search. Woosmap Indoor for indoor mapping.

performance.rate_limits: Varies by plan; not publicly documented

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: REST API with API key auth. Public (client) vs private (server) key separation. EU data residency. GDPR compliant. JavaScript SDK for maps. Store Management API for data CRUD. Limited publicly documented rate limits.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Geocoding requests fully idempotent. Store/asset reads idempotent by ID. Distance matrix idempotent for same parameters.
known_agent_gotchas: Two key types: public key (client-side, domain-restricted) vs private key (server-side only) — never expose private key
EU data residency — all location data processed in France/EU only
Store data must be pre-loaded via Store Management API before search/locator works
GDPR consent management integrated — user consent required before location features activate
Limited global coverage outside Western Europe — best for European deployments

security_score_components.security_notes: TLS enforced. GDPR compliant by design. EU data residency (France). Public vs private key separation (good security design). Domain restriction on public keys. No OAuth2 scope granularity. Location data (PII) processed in EU only. GDPR consent management built-in. French company under CNIL jurisdiction.
